title: bigelowia collinus
intro: Bigelowia collinus, also known as Bigelow's rockrose, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bigelowia collinus include wound healing, soothing of irritated skin, and reducing inflammation. Bigelowia collinus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical salve for its medicinal and health benefits.
